debug_info.goal:
A : SSet
f✝ g✝ f g h : A _⦋1⦌
H₁ : HomotopyL f g
H₂ : HomotopyL f h
σ : Subpresheaf.toPresheaf Λ[3, 1] ⟶ A := sorry
τ : A _⦋3⦌ := sorry
τ₀ : SimplicialObject.δ A 0 τ = (SimplicialObject.δ A 0 ≫ SimplicialObject.σ A 0 ≫ SimplicialObject.σ A 0) g
⊢ SimplicialObject.δ A 2 τ = H₂.simplex

proof:
by
    rw [← H₂.δ₀_eq, ← τ₀, ← SimplicialObject.δ_comp_δ A (by simp)]
    simp only [SimplicialObject.δ_comp_σ, SimplicialObject.δ_comp_σ_of_le (by simp)]
